task.question: 以R900003为线索核查是否存在拆分报销，返回构成同一异常的全部记录。

scope.exclusions: Only records needed to prove/disprove the split reimbursement rule for this specific matter

policy_questions.question: What constitutes split reimbursement under current policy?
policy_questions.clause: Article 11 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md: same employee, same expense type, within 7 days, 2+ records, combined amount reaches higher approval tier

policy_questions.question: What is the applicable approval threshold?
policy_questions.clause: Appendix II: AR-02 (3000~10000): department manager + finance review; AR-03 (10000~50000): department general manager

data_questions.question: Are there other travel_transport records for E9001 within 7 days of R900003?
Do the records share the same matter/reason?

evidence_needed: Combined amount vs individual amounts and approval tiers
execution_steps: 2. Query records for E9001 travel_transport within 7-day window [DONE]
3. Get policy clauses on split reimbursement [DONE]

reasons: Single clue record with direct lookup, no batch aggregation needed
Only 2 records found, no complex joins
No policy version ambiguity (2025 policy clearly applies)

stopping_conditions: All records in the 7-day same-employee/same-type window identified
